scenes.text: Profit is opinion. Cash is timing.
Every business is a pipeline. You pay your supplier. You hold inventory. You get paid.
The gap between paying out, and getting paid back — that's your cash conversion cycle.
Same revenue. Same margins. One floats on free customer cash. The other drowns in supplier debt.
Days holding inventory, plus days waiting on customers, minus days you owe suppliers.
Sell faster. Get paid sooner. Pay later. Squeeze the cycle, and your business funds itself.
Profit is opinion. Cash is timing.
